top_10_risks: Control Integration owner-safe bridge combines mapping and guard logic in one step and may be over-scoped.
Dataset + Eval Governance alignment mixes dataset mapping and gate behavior and may exceed one prompt.
Final Outcome OS integration may couple runtime and graph checks too tightly.
TPA input context signals could leak owner authority semantics without strict key blocklist.
Ranking Trust calibration can regress to stub fallback when sparse evidence path is untested.
Simulation harness may bypass runtime constraints if fixture boundaries are unclear.
Boundary + Integration hardening lacks explicit red-team attack cases in initial version.
Operator Intelligence summarization could assume dashboard rendering and hide artifact-first behavior.
Learning Loop feedback assimilation may permit unbounded weight updates without schema constraints.
Dependency chain from drift to dataset governance to operator intelligence can stall without stop checks.

unsafe_sequences.risk: TPA input context step added before eval governance gate can admit unverified policy annotations.
final integration before simulation can bypass edge-case stability checks.
operator summaries before drift checks can propagate stale ranking signals.

missing_controls: No explicit schema constraint requiring recommendation_only mode in each step.
No explicit readiness check artifact before final integration.
No per-step red-team then fix loop mandate in initial roadmap.
No explicit control check preventing runtime side effects in action layer.
boundary_violations: TLS-RM-13 title implies control integration without explicit owner boundary clause.
TLS-RM-18 TPA input context could be misread as runtime authority path.
recommended_fixes: Split TLS-RM-13 into mapping step and guard-validation step with explicit stop conditions.
Split TLS-RM-16 into dataset mapping then eval gate step.
Insert mandatory red-team and fix pair after each major capability step.
Add schema constraints to block forbidden owner vocabulary and runtime side effects.
Require deterministic ordering index and explicit stop_condition field in fixed roadmap.
Add explicit check that no roadmap dependency points to non-existent artifact path.
